use_cases: Collecting user feedback on web applications and websites
Gathering feature requests and bug reports from users
Enabling quick feedback submission without leaving the current page
Improving user experience through direct communication channels
ai_summary: A user feedback widget component designed for collecting ratings, comments, or bug reports directly from users. Typically appears as a floating button or modal that opens to reveal a feedback form. Built with Radix UI and Tailwind CSS for accessibility and styling flexibility. The widget enables businesses to gather actionable user insights without disrupting the user experience.
